calendar.matters:
EX PARTE PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-17-2025 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jan-16-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Sean Kenney, Esq., in court, for Sheldon Meyer, Petitioner and proposed Executor, and Benjamin Meyer, and Andrew Meyer, Objectors.
Frank Cialone, Esq., via Zoom, for Barbara Meyer, Objector.
Wendy Abkin, Esq., in court, proposed Special Administrator.

At the court's query, Mr. Kenney reports of submitting for filing a Stipulation to appoint Ms. Abkin as Special Administrator but it had been rejected. After discussion regarding the preceding, the court instructs the clerk to reverse the rejection and file the Stipulation. The court queries if the parties have considered the appointment of Ms. Abkin as general personal representative. Mr. Kenney confirms that the agreement is to appoint Ms. Abkin to only perform acts regarding tax issues. Mr. Leonard reports that he is willing to withdraw his petition. Mr. Kenney reports that he is willing to withdraw his petition.

After additional discussion, the court advises that it intends to appoint Ms. Abkin as Special Administrator but will require her to file a DE-147 and DE-147S forms prior before the court can sign the order. The request to appoint Special Administrator is taken under submission. The individual petitions for Letters of Administration are taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Nam. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jan-16-2024 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jan-02-2024 Continued To Jan-16-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jan-02-2024 Continued To Jan-16-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:

Duane Leonard, via Zoom, in propria persona, Petitioner.

Frank Cialone, Esq., via Zoom, for Barbara Meyer, Objector.

Sean Kenney, Esq., in court, for and with Sheldon Meyer, Petitioner.

At the court's query, Mr. Kenney reports that since the previous calling, proposed Special Administrator Kevin Rodriguez has declined to serve and requests that the court appoint his client Mr. Meyer in the same capacity instead and continue the matter two (2) weeks. Mr. Kenney also reports of ongoing settlement discussions. Mr. Cialone objects to Mr. Meyer's request and offers his position regarding settlement discussions. After additional discussion, the court advises that the parties should discuss the appointment of a Special Administrator and that the court will consider ruling on the pending petitions if the parties are unable to reach an agreement regarding the preceding.

The subject matters are continued to Jan-16-2024 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Jaime/Reed. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Dec-05-2023 Continued To Jan-02-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom):

Duane Leonard, in propria persona, Petitioner.
Sean Kenney, Esq., for Sheldon Meyer, Petitioner.
Frank Cialone, Esq., for Barbara Meyer, Objector.

The parties confirm that they have agreed to appoint Kevin Rodriguez to serve as special administrator. The court confirms with the parties that Mr. Rodriguez is an attorney and that he will be asked to file a DE-147 and DE-147S before it will sign an order appointing him as special administrator. The court queries counsel regarding whether the parties have considered stipulating to Mr. Rodriguez' appointment as general personal representative. Mr. Kenney advises that the preceding will be considered.

After additional discussion, the subject matters are continued to Jan-02-2024 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Park. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Dec-05-2023 Continued To Jan-02-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

EX PARTE PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION, Limited Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Nov-20-2023 Denied

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Nov-14-2023 Continued To Dec-05-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: William Norman in person and Scott Mcleod via zoom for Sheldon Meyer (petitioner).
Duane Leonard appeared in person with Stephen Walker in person (Tax counsel).
Yulissa Zulaica in person for Barbara Meyer (objector).

Discussion was held regarding third party administrator, that all parties agree to continue the matter for 2 weeks to come to decision on who the administrator shall be, and that an ex parte was filed to address the urgency to have a Power of Attorney appointed to receive tax documents. Both matters are continued to December 05, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.


Judge: Stephen Murphy: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Martin: Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Nov-14-2023 Continued To Dec-05-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Oct-10-2023 Continued To Nov-14-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Oct-10-2023 Continued To Nov-14-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: William Norman in person for Sheldon Meyer (petitioner).
Duane Leonard appeared via zoom for Stephen Walker in person (Tax counsel).
Yulissa Zulaica in person for Barbara Meyer (objector).

Discussion as held regarding who will receive the IRS notice of deficiency, that upon receiving the notice parties have ninety days to determine assessment, that the current tax counsel's powers expired on October 10, 2023, and that the Tax Court will only speak with the current Power of Attorney. Mr. Norman stated that a continuance of this petition is necessary to fix the issues raised by the examiner. Ms. Zulaica stated that Sheldon Meyer is a suspended administrator, that a third party be appointed, and that she would object to Sheldon Meyer being appointed. The Court orders that any notice received from the IRS shall be circulated to all parties. Petition for probate of will and letters of testamentary and Petition for probate of will and letters of administration with will annexed are continued to November 07, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Clear all defects by November 07, 2023.

Judge: Stephen Murphy: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Puliego: Not reported.
